prestazioni: Upgrade the M275 E50 AMG V12 engine with a custom twin-turbo system using Garrett GT4202R turbos (64mm inducer, 88mm exducer) paired with a PWR Australia intercooler (W220-specific core, 1200hp capacity) and a custom 4-inch stainless steel exhaust with MagnaFlow 304SS mufflers (2.5-inch dual outlets, 309-grade tubing)

Install a standalone ECU from Motec M150 with a custom calibration for the M275 E50, including a flex-fuel sensor (Continental 5WK96621) and a dual Bosch 0280158002 fuel pump setup (220 lph each) with Injector Dynamics ID2000XL injectors (2000cc/min, 1000hp capable)

Replace the stock 5-speed 5G-Tronic transmission with a Mercedes-Benz 7G-Tronic (722.906) from a W221 S65 AMG, reinforced with a Level 10 transmission valve body and a South Bend Clutch Stage 3 twin-disc clutch (2400lb clamping force, cerametallic friction material)
estetica: Install a Wald International #112 675 10 02 Black Bison widebody kit (W220-specific, 30mm extended fenders, carbon fiber front splitter, and rear diffuser with integrated tow hooks)

Replace the stock headlights with Hella Dynamic Curve LED projectors (D1S retrofit, 5500K color temperature) and install a custom rear light setup using Osram LED strips (RL12W, sequential turn signals, smoked lenses)

Add a custom interior overhaul with Recaro Pole Position seats (W220-specific mounts, Alcantara/leather upholstery), a MOMO Mod.78 steering wheel (380mm diameter, suede grip), and a custom carbon fiber dashboard overlay by Vorsteiner (W220-specific, matte finish)
